about.label: About
about.title: Empathy at the service of logic
about.text1_description: As a former nurse turned web developer, I chose this path because everything that motivated me in my previous career is here too: rigor, attention to detail, and problem-solving. I enjoy the logic of code just as much as crafting a polished interface.
about.text2_description: Trained on the MERN stack, I have worked across every layer — integration, React frontend, secure REST API, SEO, performance and accessibility — and I used the creation of this portfolio as an opportunity to learn TypeScript, adding an extra layer of reliability to my code.
about.text3_description: What all these experiences have in common: each time, I learned fast, on my own, and until I truly mastered it. I am methodical and rigorous, I structure before I act, and I deliver work I am proud of.
about.text4_description: Based in Yverdon-les-Bains, I am looking for my first web development position, in a team where continuous learning is valued.

skills.text_CV: Click here to download my CV

kasa.title: Kasa
kasa.card_description: A peer-to-peer real estate rental web application.
kasa.about: Kasa is a modern peer-to-peer rental application. I developed the entire user interface using React, building a smooth, fully responsive application that strictly adheres to the provided design mockups.
challenges: Managing smooth navigation without page reloads (Single Page Application).
Building complex interactive components such as image galleries and dropdowns without third-party libraries.
Handling errors for invalid URLs or non-existent listings.
solutions: Configuration of React Router to orchestrate navigation between the pages of the site.
Development of custom components (Collapse, Carousel) making full use of React Hooks.
Implementation of a dedicated 404 error page and automatic redirection for invalid identifiers.

monVieuxGrimoire.title: Mon Vieux Grimoire
monVieuxGrimoire.card_description: A secure REST API and database for a book rating and reference website.
monVieuxGrimoire.about: Mon Vieux Grimoire is a book rating website for a small local bookshop. I developed the entire back-end of the application, setting up a robust database and a secure REST API allowing users to authenticate, add books and post reviews.
challenges: Securing user data and authentication processes.
Handling large image uploads without impacting server storage.
Implementing a strict rating system (one rating per user per book).
solutions: Implementation of JWT tokens and password hashing with bcrypt.
Integration of Sharp and Multer to automatically optimize, resize and convert images to WebP format.
Development of server-side validation logic via Mongoose to prevent duplicate votes.

ninaCarducci.title: Nina Carducci
ninaCarducci.card_description: Global optimization of performance, accessibility and SEO for a professional photographer's showcase website.
ninaCarducci.about: Nina Carducci is the showcase website of a professional photographer. The main objective of this project was to carry out a complete audit of an existing site in order to optimize its overall performance, improve its natural search engine ranking (SEO) and ensure its technical accessibility for all users.
challenges: Fixing the critical loading speed caused by massive, unoptimized images.
Restructuring the code to allow search engines to better understand and index the site.
Making the site fully accessible (WCAG) and fixing portfolio navigation bugs.
solutions: Compression, resizing and conversion of all images to the modern WebP format, drastically reducing page weight.
Semantic rewriting of HTML tags, integration of Schema.org tags (structured data) and Open Graph Meta tags.
Correction of color contrasts, addition of missing aria-label attributes and implementation of smooth keyboard navigation.

portfolio.title: Professional Portfolio
portfolio.card_description: Design and development of my web developer portfolio, featuring a custom design system, typed architecture and multilingual support.
portfolio.about: Creation of my professional showcase to present my projects and developer skills. This project was designed to be performant, accessible, fully typed with TypeScript, and scalable to accommodate future projects.
challenges: Setting up a modern and fast environment with the latest version of Tailwind CSS v4.
Cleanly structuring the application into reusable and typed components.
Implementing a smooth FR/EN translation system to extend the portfolio's reach.
solutions: Project initialization with Vite and configuration of the new Tailwind v4 compiler using native CSS variables.
Strict use of TypeScript interfaces to secure project data and transpose Figma Auto Layout into code.
Integration of react-i18next with asynchronous loading of JSON translation files.
